name: sap-datasphere
description: Thin Claude Code wrapper around the SAP Datasphere MCP server with setup prompts, skills, and subagents.

tenant_url.title: Tenant URL
tenant_url.description: SAP Datasphere tenant base URL, for example https://your-tenant.eu10.hcs.cloud.sap

oauth_token_url.title: OAuth Token URL
oauth_token_url.description: OAuth token URL for the technical client

verify_tls.title: Verify TLS
verify_tls.description: 1 to verify TLS certificates, 0 to disable verification for special proxy cases

mock_mode.title: Mock Mode
mock_mode.description: 1 to enable mock mode for testing without a live tenant, 0 for live
